posts.title: "That is the madness that SCOTUS put a stop to today. Keep in mind also that this lawsuit has been going on since 2017. So for nearly 10 years, we have wasted resources to get a SCOTUS ruling that is just basic common sense."

quotedTweet.content: 🚨 In a 6-3 vote, the Supreme Court rules that asylum seekers standing in Mexico have not “arrived in the United States” under immigration law, meaning they aren’t entitled to inspection or allowed to apply for asylum until they actually cross the border.

twitter.content:

posts.title: "It'd be crazy for us to say that Haitians couldn't live in Haiti. It's their country."

quotedTweet.content:
REPORTER: "Do you expect the Administration to deport anyone who loses TPS status as a result of this ruling?"

@StephenM: "Well, of course. If no longer have status in this country, then you're supposed to be deported."

twitter.content:
"Does the Administration consider Haiti a safe country?"

@StephenM: "For Haitians? Absolutely. Haitians live in Haiti... It'd be crazy for us to say that Haitians couldn't live in Haiti. It's their country."
